38550 Sierra Lakes Dr, Oakhurst, CA 93644, USA

At the Broken Bridge that separates the two openings of Sierra Lakes Drive there is a massive Blackberry bush, big enough that you could get lost in it. It tastes delicious and is not on anyone's property Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-August.
Some blackberries at the back of the lot of the abandoned building here. Access: Private.
Some blackberries at the back of the lot of the abandoned building here. Access: Private.

Another Blackberry Bush ,this one in the Taco Bell Drive-thru. It's close enough to the driving lane that you could probably reach out from your car and eat some while you wait for your order. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: April-August
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
